# Chinmay Arora | AI Engineering, Responsible Data Science, Governance, and Analytics

> Summary: Chinmay Arora's portfolio covers AI engineering, responsible machine learning, AI governance and strategy, analytics engineering, BI systems, RAG/document intelligence, technical writing, and product-oriented data work.

## Canonical Entry Points

- [Portfolio Home](https://app.chinmayarora.com/): Main portfolio landing page for professional profile, selected projects, experience, and technical writing.
- [Projects](https://app.chinmayarora.com/projects/): Public and privacy-safe project index. Public repos are linked; private work is described at product/outcome level only.
- [Experience](https://app.chinmayarora.com/experience/): Work and education timeline.
- [The Lab](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/): Venture and product concept showcase.
- [Blog](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/): Technical essays on AI systems, governance, retrieval, evaluation, and strategy.
- [Coursework](https://app.chinmayarora.com/coursework/): MS and B.Tech academic project work linked to public repositories where available.

## Highlighted Work

- [Aegis AI Governance & Readiness](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/aegis-ai-strategy/): Highlighted governance workstream covering readiness scorecards, risk registers, human-review gates, audit evidence, monitoring, and executive-ready AI adoption artifacts. Live surfaces: [Aegis app](https://aegisai-5wz.pages.dev) and [readiness survey](https://aegis-survey.vercel.app).
- [PolyRAG](https://github.com/ChinmayA301/PolyRAG): Multi-model RAG over public AI-governance documents with citation-grounded answers, FAISS retrieval, OCR fallback, FastAPI, Docker, and a hosted Hugging Face demo at https://chinmaya301-polyrag.hf.space.
- [Operations Control Tower](https://github.com/ChinmayA301/Operations-Control-Tower): Operations analytics on real Olist data with SQL star schema, supplier risk score, Great Expectations checks, and Looker Studio-ready marts.
- [Healthcare Readmission Risk with Fairness & Calibration](https://github.com/ChinmayA301/Risk-Prediction-with-Fairness-Geography): Responsible-AI risk-modeling prototype with leakage control, calibration, Fairlearn subgroup checks, SHAP, and model-card limitations.
- [Tabular ML Benchmark](https://github.com/ChinmayA301/Tabular-ML-Benchmark-Human-Feature-Engineering-vs-AutoML-Agentic-Baselines): Config-driven benchmark across real domains measuring AUC, calibration, runtime, and robustness under shift.
- [FinBizInfo](https://www.finbizinfo.com): Financial document intelligence deployment for OCR/RAG-style extraction, risk flags, and structured analysis.
- TransferSignal: Private football transfer-rumour intelligence board with deterministic scoring, source reliability ledger, AI-assisted claim extraction, protected admin workflows, and newsroom-style UX. No private repo is public-linked.
- Stock Analyzer: Coming-soon investment research and market analytics project reserved for a future GitHub upload. Expected public framing: data ingestion, factor/technical analysis, model evaluation, explainable signals, and investor-readable reporting.
- Multi-Agent AI-Native ERP for Compliance Mapping: Active private build for mapping company workflows, obligations, controls, evidence, owners, readiness gaps, and recurring execution across compliance-heavy functions. Capability is public; implementation details and schemas are private.
- AI Survey & Interviewing Tool: Active product workstream for adaptive interviews, survey design, multilingual response capture, quality scoring, structured extraction, and insight synthesis for stakeholder research and readiness assessment.
- AI Football Intelligence & Tracking System: Active sports-intelligence direction spanning TransferSignal, source reliability, player/team tracking, tactical context, confidence scoring, and editorial-grade dashboards.
- AI Lead Discovery & CRM Improvement: Private consulting-demo workstream for agentic lead discovery, enrichment, scoring, account research, outreach support, and CRM hygiene with auditable agent steps.
- AI Governance Setup for Regulated Teams: Advisory and implementation work for HIPAA, finance, public-sector, and school contexts, including AI readiness, policy mapping, risk registers, acceptable-use boundaries, vendor review, human oversight, evidence trails, and pilot evaluation.
- Freight Forwarding Finance BI: CargoWise-shaped Power BI/SQL analytics for job margin variance, AR aging, DSO, branch performance, and source reconciliation. Client/private details are not exposed.
- [SignalGraph](https://github.com/ChinmayA301/Signal-Graph): Credibility-adjusted signal layer for detecting fake-star and open-source metric manipulation.
- [Wax Seal](https://github.com/ChinmayA301/wax-seal): Trust-provenance framework for visible tamper evidence and digital-artifact authenticity.
- [Geo Visualizer](https://geo-visualizer-mu.vercel.app): Interactive geographic visualization for the Indian subcontinent.
- [Severance-Style Segmentation Interface](https://severance-style-visualizer.vercel.app): Product-style segmentation visualization interface.

## Coursework, Publications, and Credentials

- [MS Projects](https://github.com/ChinmayA301/MS-projectss): Coursework and academic builds across machine learning systems, PostgreSQL/data workflows, social-data optimization, computer vision, and geospatial/public-health analytics.
- [B.Tech Projects](https://github.com/ChinmayA301/BTech): Undergraduate project archive including financial modeling, sports analytics, OCR/NLP document parsing, and optimization work.
- [Face Mask Detection using Deep Learning CNN Architecture, IJSER](https://www.ijser.in/archives/v10i12/SE221206135738.pdf): CNN-based computer-vision publication and minor project signal.
- [Payment System for University, IJSER](https://www.ijser.in/archives/v11i8/SE23822002659.pdf): undergraduate payment-system publication covering university ID-card payment architecture.
- Publications: Face Mask Detection using Deep Learning CNN Architecture; Payment System for University; 17+ public technical essays on analytics, AI systems, RAG, and governance.
- Certifications and credential signals: CargoWise One Professional Certification, Microsoft Azure, Web Applications and Databases using PHP, Claude / AI coding tooling, IBM Data Science, Google IoT for Google Cloud, analytics and BI tooling.
- Live tracking graph: the Projects page includes an AI Evaluation Benchmark Pulse that ingests live GitHub repository search data for LLM evaluation, RAG evaluation, agent evaluation, and ML benchmarking repositories, then renders a cohort-based traction chart and top-repository table.

## The Lab Venture Exploration

The Lab is Chinmay Arora's venture and product exploration surface. It highlights Aegis without making it the only focus and also includes career simulation, AI survey/interview intelligence, AI-native enterprise operating systems, freight/logistics intelligence, senior-focused AI phone assistance, experience-based media worlds, text-to-AR utility systems, high-friction data access products, sports intelligence, and nutrition/satiation system redesign.

Relevant public writing and surfaces:

- [Aegis AI Strategy](https://app.chinmayarora.com/ideas/aegis-ai-strategy/): AI governance and readiness workstream.
- [Text-to-AR Utility Systems](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/text-to-ar-human-centered-standard/): Human-centered AR and spatial interface framing.
- [Simulation Engineering for AI](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/simulation-engineering-ai/): Proxy data, simulation, and decision systems under imperfect information.
- [Successful Key Moment Metric](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/successful-key-moment-metric/): Football intelligence and sports analytics framing.
- [Satiation-Adjusted Nutrition](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/satiation-adjusted/): Food, serving-size, and consumer behavior systems.

## Blog Positioning

The blog is best described as research notes, concept essays, and evidence-backed analysis, not a collection of project tutorials. Posts marked as "Research / Concept Note" present product theses, system frameworks, proposed metrics, governance models, or research directions for discussion. They should not be interpreted as claims that a product is fully launched or that a method is production-validated unless the post explicitly says so.

High-signal research/concept clusters:

- AI governance and public-sector AI: local government AI, segmentation, AI governance/privacy, Aegis.
- RAG, memory, and AI infrastructure: Context Passport, PolyRAG, agent protocol layers.
- Trust, provenance, and platform integrity: Wax Seal, SignalGraph, AI-generated content tracking.
- Sports and media intelligence: Successful Key Moment, Ronaldo context analysis, media cultural impact, AI localization, Indian media strategy.
- Simulation and decision systems: Simulation Engineering AI, Decision Intelligence, proxy data, forecast discipline.

## Technical Writing

Selected essays that support the project claims:

- [AI in Local Government DX](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/the-impact-of-ai-on-local-government-digital-experience/): Governance, auditability, risk tiering, and operational AI implementation in local government.
- [AI Governance and Privacy](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/AI-Governance-and-Privacy/): Trust layer for high-risk AI adoption, vendor risk, and governance controls.
- [Public Sector Segmentation](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/segmentation/): Resident/customer segmentation as a safer AI deployment backbone.
- [Context Passport](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/context-passport/): Portable AI memory, provenance, diffs, privacy scopes, and context packing.
- [SignalGraph](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/fake-star/): Replacing raw GitHub stars with credibility-adjusted open-source signals.
- [Wax Seal Cybersecurity](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/waxseal-cybersec/): Trust, provenance, and tamper-evidence framing for digital systems.
- [Data Science Career Audit](https://app.chinmayarora.com/blog/data-science-career-audit/): Source-backed labor-market analysis of data science, AI pressure, and durable role signals.

## Current Positioning

Chinmay Arora is an M.S. Data Science candidate at the University of Minnesota focused on AI engineering, responsible ML, governance strategy, RAG systems, analytics engineering, BI dashboards, geospatial analysis, and product strategy. Public work emphasizes real datasets, calibration, subgroup analysis, drift/robustness checks, model cards, source-backed writing, and privacy-safe presentation of private product work.

## Skills

Python, SQL, R, pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch, TensorFlow, SHAP, Fairlearn, calibration, MLflow, Evidently, LangChain, LlamaIndex, FAISS, ChromaDB, Pinecone, RAGAS, FastAPI, Docker, Supabase, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Azure SQL, Power BI, Tableau, QlikSense, Looker Studio, Excel/VBA, ArcGIS, GeoPandas, PySAL, NIST AI RMF, risk registers, model cards, human-in-the-loop review, AI readiness assessment, technical writing.
